title: Creamy Smoky Norwegian Penne Pasta
description: A pungent and gooey Norwegian dish featuring penne pasta, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings, with a smoky flavor and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the penne pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
Drain the pasta and set it aside.
In a large saucepan, combine the heavy cream, smoked gouda cheese, norwegian brown cheese, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Stir the cheese mixture over medium heat until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Add the cooked penne pasta to the cheese sauce and stir until the pasta is well coated.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer the pasta for 2-3 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the creamy smoky penne pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
